_comment: Per-model metadata for locating the assistant-role marker in a chat-template-rendered prompt. When a template is applied with add_generation_prompt=True, the final tokens encode the assistant turn header. We find the LAST token whose decoded string (stripped) equals role_token_substring, then probe positions [idx-1, idx, idx+1] — i.e., (a) the start-of-turn marker immediately before the role name, (b) the role-name token itself, (c) the token immediately after (usually a newline or header-close marker).
